text: It's when I go to school, I'm sometimes very lucky
It's when I am in school, I'm often very happy
But I don't give a shit that I look so ugly
It's not true that I'm not very pretty
It's when I am in class, I look so tired
It's when I go home, I look so bored
But I'm not nervous, I'm just a child
But I'm not nervous, I'm just sad
It's when I play music, I am...
